TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi sealed SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp extends System.Enum

Docs.summary: Identifies transfer functions (opto-electronic transfer characteristics) using ITU-T H.273 / ISO 23001-8 Coding-Independent Code Points (CICP) values.
Docs.remarks:
## Remarks
`SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp` enumerates the standard transfer functions defined by the ITU-T H.273 and ISO/IEC 23001-8 specifications. These values are used as parameters when calling <xref:SkiaSharp.SKColorSpace.CreateCicp*> to create a CICP-specified color space.
Each member's numeric value corresponds directly to the "Transfer characteristics" code point in Table 3 of ITU-T H.273.
## Examples
Creating an HDR PQ color space with BT.2020 primaries:
```csharp using var colorSpace = SKColorSpace.CreateCicp( SKColorspacePrimariesCicp.Rec2020, SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp.Pq, SKColorspaceMatrixCoefficients.Identity, SKColorspaceRange.Full); ```

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Hlg = int32(18)

Docs.summary: ARIB STD-B67 Hybrid Log-Gamma (HLG) transfer characteristics (code point 18), used for HDR broadcast per ITU-R BT.2100.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Iec6196621 = int32(13)

Docs.summary: IEC 61966-2-1 transfer characteristics (code point 13), defining the sRGB and sYCC transfer functions.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Iec6196624 = int32(11)

Docs.summary: IEC 61966-2-4 transfer characteristics (code point 11), used for xvYCC extended-gamut video.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Linear = int32(8)

Docs.summary: Linear transfer characteristics with no gamma encoding (code point 8).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Pq = int32(16)

Docs.summary: SMPTE ST 2084 Perceptual Quantizer (PQ) transfer characteristics (code point 16), used for HDR10 content.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Rec202010bit = int32(14)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.2020 10-bit transfer characteristics (code point 14), used for 10-bit UHD content.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Rec202012bit = int32(15)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.2020 12-bit transfer characteristics (code point 15), used for 12-bit UHD content.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Rec470SystemBg = int32(5)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.470 System B/G transfer characteristics (code point 5), assuming a display gamma of 2.8.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Rec470SystemM = int32(4)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.470 System M transfer characteristics (code point 4), assuming a display gamma of 2.2.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Rec601 = int32(6)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.601 transfer characteristics (code point 6), used for standard-definition television.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Rec709 = int32(1)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.709 transfer characteristics (code point 1), used for HDTV; also matches sRGB in practice.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp SmpteSt240 = int32(7)

Docs.summary: SMPTE ST 240 transfer characteristics (code point 7), used for early HDTV production.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp SmpteSt4281 = int32(17)

Docs.summary: SMPTE ST 428-1 transfer characteristics (code point 17), defining the D-Cinema transfer function with a power-law gamma of approximately 2.6.

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Unknown = int32(0)

Docs.summary: Unknown or unspecified transfer characteristics (code point 0).
